creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, I'm starving. You wanna go to Panda Express with me? I'm down. I'm just gonna get the bowl. We're gonna do double grilled chicken teriyaki and then a large diet coke. Wait, and you're losing weight eating like that? Yeah, I've been able to lose 20 pounds and I still eat out whenever I want. Nice, who's your coach? Seth G changed the game for me. Man, I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption: Comment FASTFOOD for my fast food cheat sheet. Panda Express: Bowl: Super Greens + Double Grilled Teriyaki Chicken + Large Diet Coke (760 calories 73G protein). Saves you over a 1,000 calories and helps you stay on track with your fitness journey. Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps.
ocr_summary: Panda Express: 1910 cal / 53g protein -> 760 cal / 73g protein

swaps.original_meal: Standard Panda Express bowl (rice, orange chicken, etc.)
swaps.swap_meal: Bowl with super greens + double grilled teriyaki chicken + large Diet Coke

parsed.notes: Single restaurant swap (Panda Express only). Same skit format. Slightly different calorie/protein numbers than position 13's Panda Express swap (760/73 vs 690/69). Same creator as positions 12 and 13.
